species: HKU1 is a human beta coronavirus and infects host cells via highly glycosylated spike protein (S).
sample_source: Bovine fetuin, a glycoprotein containing sialylated N-linked and O-linked glycans, was used to evaluate the specificity and selectivity of HBS materials for O-glycopeptide enrichment.
cell_line: HKU S1 (expressed from HEK293 cells, the purity ＞ 93.2%) was purchased from Sino Biological.
